title: BCRPP shared schema definitions
description: Reusable building blocks shared across all BCRPP table schemas. Only invariant tokens are centralised here; the context-specific 666/777 sentinels are inlined per field because their meanings differ by variable.

missing3.title: Missing/Unknown
missing3.description: Sentinel denoting a missing/unknown value in a 3-digit field (integer, decimal, or categorical).

missing4.title: Missing/Unknown
missing4.description: Sentinel denoting a missing/unknown value in a 4-digit field (calendar year).

subject_id.title: Subject ID
subject_id.description: Individual ID combining study and person info, formatted '<study_id>_<person_id>' (e.g. 16_0012345). The two-digit prefix is one of the 24 BCRPP study codes 01-24 enumerated in COHORT_METADATA.study_id.
subject_id.$comment: Source CORE row 3: 'Study ID + "_" + person ID (e.g.: XX_XXX)'.

date_ddmmyyyy.title: Date (dd/mm/yyyy)
date_ddmmyyyy.description: Calendar date in dd/mm/yyyy format. The reserved value 08/08/8000 denotes Missing/Unknown.
date_ddmmyyyy.$comment: The sentinel 08/08/8000 deliberately satisfies this pattern (a oneOf split would double-match), so missingness is documented here rather than enforced as a separate branch.
